ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
Language: c%23
Synchronize Codex session provider metadata across rollout files and SQLite state.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Orbmu2k/nvidiaProfileInspector
Language: c%23

Language: c%23
Lean Algorithmic Trading Engine by QuantConnect (Python, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Radarr/Radarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Radarr/Radarr
Language: c%23
Movie organizer/manager for usenet and torrent users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/runner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/runner
Language: c%23
The Runner for GitHub Actions 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed0ard/CS2-Bot-Improver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed0ard/CS2-Bot-Improver
Language: c%23
CS2-Bot-Improver is a plugin for Counter-Strike 2 that improves bots' aim, movement, nade throwing, personalities, strategies, etc. Aims to enhance your experience when playing against bots offline or with friends. It can be installed on both clients and servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: icsharpcode/ILSpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/icsharpcode/ILSpy
Language: c%23
.NET Decompiler with support for PDB generation, ReadyToRun, Metadata (&more) - cross-platform!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
Language: c%23
Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template for ASP.NET Core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
Language: c%23
Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!
